类 AbstractOpenApiBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.builder.openapi.AbstractOpenApiBuilder
直接已知子类:
OpenApiBuilder, SwaggerBuilder
public abstract class AbstractOpenApiBuilder extends Object
abstract openapi builder
从以下版本开始:
2.6.2

      返回:

    • buildComponentData

      public Map<String,Object> buildComponentData(ApiSchema<ApiDoc> apiSchema)
      Builds component data for API documentation. This method iterates through all API documentation entries to extract request and response parameter information, and organizes them into OpenAPI component schemas.
      参数:
      apiSchema - The API documentation schema.
      返回:
      Returns a map containing all component schemas.

    • getOpenApiDocs

      public ApiSchema<ApiDoc> getOpenApiDocs(ApiConfig config, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder projectBuilder)
      Get a list of OpenAPI's document data
      参数:
      config - Configuration of stagger
      projectBuilder - JavaDocBuilder of QDox
      返回:
      List of OpenAPI's document data
